content:
💡 PhotoGIMP | CSS
🎯 Primary Use Case: To make GIMP's user interface and controls feel familiar to Adobe Photoshop users, easing the transition for those switching to GIMP.
✨ Key Features: • Photoshop-like tool layout • Custom Splash Screen • Maximized canvas space • Photoshop keyboard shortcuts • Custom icon & name
📖 Summary: PhotoGIMP is a patch for GIMP that modifies its user interface and keyboard shortcuts to closely resemble Adobe Photoshop. It aims to provide a familiar environment for users transitioning from Photoshop to the free and open-source GIMP, enhancing usability for those accustomed to Adobe's workflow.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
